provenance: Synthetic, hand-written for WP5. No real user data. Each expectedStyle is the exact output of shared/voice.ts buildVoiceStyleFromTweets(profileTweets) at fixture-authoring time; the fixtures test re-derives and asserts equality, so drift in voice measurement fails CI.

profiles.description: Indie hacker who posts short, declarative, no-emoji build notes.
profileTweets: Shipped the eval gate today. Small diff, big safety net.
Most bugs are just assumptions you never checked.
Write the test first. Watch it fail. Then fix it.
Slow is smooth. Smooth is fast.
If it needs a comment to explain, rewrite it.

profiles.description: High-energy founder who posts milestone celebrations with emoji and exclamation marks.
profileTweets: Okay this is HUGE 🚀🚀 we just crossed 10k users and I'm not okay!!!
Three years ago I was broke, coding at 2am. Today we hit a milestone I never imagined 🙌 keep going, it compounds!!!
I can't believe this actually worked 😭 the demo went perfectly!!!
Big things coming this week 👀 you are NOT ready for what we built 🔥
